personal_profile.headline: Staff Backend Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Backend engineer with platform delivery and supporting reliability experience.

bullets.text: Architected backend services on AWS and Kubernetes with Terraform, reducing deployment time 52%.

Owned reliability reviews and delivery planning for platform APIs serving critical internal teams.
